description: SureVoIP is a UK business telecoms and VoIP provider offering hosted telephony, SIP services, numbers, messaging, and related account management. Its platform lets customers and partners manage telecom resources and automate tasks such as calls, SMS, provisioning, and billing.
summary: SureVoIP exposes one documented REST HTTP API with an OpenAPI spec, available at production and sandbox hosts, authenticated via either Basic Auth or OAuth 2.0.
